title: Auto Load Live Map
lead: With Auto Load, the live map fills itself: pan or zoom and Cachly fetches the caches for the new area — no need to tap refresh.

sections.heading: How it works
sections.text: Normally the Live map loads caches when you tap the refresh button in the tool stack . With Auto Load enabled, Cachly requests caches automatically whenever you move the map to a new area, so browsing a region feels continuous. ℹ Every load counts against your geocaching.com API limits like a manual refresh does — Cachly loads lite cache data to keep usage light, but if you pan across a continent, expect it to add up.
